mods.name: AirPlay Receiver
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Cast from iPhone or Mac. Turn this device into your AirPlay screen and speaker.
mods.detail_description: Mirror the display, stream albums with artwork, or play video fullscreen. Shows up as {device name} [Airplay] on the same Wi-Fi. Ties to the voice satellite; PIN and ducking when you want them.

mods.name: DLNA Renderer
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Cast from your phone or tablet. Turn this device into your DLNA speaker and screen.
mods.detail_description: Stream music and video from BubbleUPnP and other UPnP controllers. Optional Cinema UI with artwork; duck playback volume while you talk to the voice assistant.

mods.name: HA Edge TTS
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Speak with Microsoft Edge voices. Natural TTS for your Home Assistant pipeline.
mods.detail_description: Wyoming cloud TTS powered by Microsoft Edge voices — 400+ voices across 40+ languages. Point Home Assistant at the local Wyoming port and hear replies in the voice you pick.

mods.name: HA STT Engine
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Listen offline. Multilingual speech-to-text without leaving your LAN.
mods.detail_description: On-device SenseVoice STT for zh / en / ja / ko / Cantonese (~230MB first download). Exposes a Wyoming TCP server so Home Assistant voice pipelines can listen offline on your LAN.

mods.name: Allwinner A64 Custom
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Feel at home on Allwinner A64 tablets and smart screens.
mods.detail_description: Compatibility hooks for Ococci and similar Allwinner A64 tablets and smart screens — brightness, overlays, and everyday controls behave like a first-class panel.

mods.name: Echo Show Support
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Bring the assistant to life on Amazon Echo Show with brightness, BLE, overlays, and a calm dark screensaver.
mods.detail_description: Echo Show hardware hooks: screen brightness, Bluetooth, overlay stacking, and screensaver dark-off so the assistant UI feels native on Amazon panels.

mods.name: WiFi & ADB Keep-Alive
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Stay reachable. Wi-Fi stays on and ADB stays ready after crashes and reboots.
mods.detail_description: Keeps Wi-Fi radio and ADB debugging alive across crashes and reboots so remote installs and LAN access do not vanish overnight. Prefers root; falls back to Shizuku. Never turns them off.

mods.name: Flashlight
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Flip the torch on or off from Home Assistant. Handy light in one tap.
mods.detail_description: Expose a simple torch switch in Home Assistant. Toggle the camera LED from automations, dashboards, or voice — useful as a night light or closet lamp.

mods.name: BLE ADV Proxy
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Reach nearby fans and lamps from Home Assistant. This device becomes your BLE remote.
mods.detail_description: Scan nearby BLE devices and send advertise packets for ha-ble-adv fans and lamps. While enabled this mod owns BLE scan/TX (built-in Bluetooth proxy steps aside).

mods.name: GPS Location
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Show where this device is. Live GPS in Home Assistant for maps, presence, and automations.
mods.detail_description: Publish latitude, longitude, altitude, speed, and accuracy as Home Assistant sensors. Tune update interval and movement threshold so presence and map cards stay fresh without draining the battery.

mods.name: OpenClaw(Mini)
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: An on-device AI sidekick for screenshots, taps, automation, and room to grow skills.
mods.detail_description: On-device AI for screenshots, UI taps, automation, diagnostics, and messaging. Expand with skills over time without leaving the phone — optional local console and HA sensors.

mods.name: Qcom Audio
mods.author: pantherale0
mods.description: Stop voice and media fighting for the mic. Smoother assistant audio on Qualcomm (ThinkSmart View).
mods.detail_description: Applies Qualcomm audio-concurrency tweaks so the voice assistant and media playback can share the mic and speaker path cleanly — aimed at ThinkSmart View and similar devices.

mods.name: Phicomm R1
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Wake the R1 light ring with voice-reactive glow and music RGB that feel native.
mods.detail_description: Native R1 LED ring: stock voice and dormant lights, optional 4-mic directional wake glow, and RGB music visualization while tracks play — ducked automatically during voice.

mods.name: Facebook Portal
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Make Portal feel first-class with presence, volume keys, ambient sensing, and polite alerts.
mods.detail_description: Presence, ambient light, gestures, physical volume, sound level, screen timeout, and alert tones wired for Facebook Portal hardware so dashboards and automations feel native.

mods.name: Tuya S8E
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Dim both S8E backlights and read the room. Temperature and humidity at a glance.
mods.detail_description: Control the main screen and small-display backlights independently, and expose onboard temperature and humidity sensors to Home Assistant for climate cards and automations.

mods.name: IR Blaster (ESPhome)
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Point at the TV. Send infrared like a native ESPHome blaster from Home Assistant.
mods.detail_description: Turn the device IR emitter into an ESPHome-style blaster for Home Assistant. USB detection included; default native API on TCP 6054 with optional mDNS discovery.

mods.name: YX LED Controller
mods.author: slovebj
mods.description: Light up the YX M5612 with LED and motion sensing in one small package.
mods.detail_description: Drive the YX M5612 LED output and read its motion sensor from Home Assistant — handy for status lights, night cues, or occupancy-triggered scenes.

mods.name: Screen Color Filter
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Wash the screen in a soft tint. Night mode moods from Home Assistant.
mods.detail_description: Full-screen translucent tint above every layer — pick off, red, blue, dark, yellow, green, or gray from Home Assistant. Touch input still passes through for night-mode moods.

mods.name: Sticky Note
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Pin a floating note on screen. Drag it where you need it from Home Assistant.
mods.detail_description: Push any Home Assistant text onto a floating on-screen note. Drag it where you need it, resize via settings, and clear it when the reminder is done.

mods.name: Zigbee Gateway
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Plug in a Zigbee stick. Bridge serial to TCP for your coordinator.
mods.detail_description: Bridge a USB Zigbee coordinator over serial-to-TCP for Zigbee2MQTT or ZHA. Works with Tuya S6E/T6E/S7E/S9E, NSPanel Pro, and similar sticks on the LAN.
